title: Scaling Recipes Up and Down
instruction: Answer the questions about changing recipe amounts.
context: Original recipe (serves 4): 400g pasta, 200g cheese, 500ml cream, 4 cloves of garlic.

questions.question: To serve 2 people, how much pasta?
To serve 8 people, how much cheese?
To serve 6 people, how much cream? (Hint: 500 ÷ 4 = 125 per person)
To serve 1 person, how many cloves of garlic?
